TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}

S.FORM: pai aitsu uri maleva men tjanusun a naqemati a Tsemas.
S.PHON: pai aiʦu uri maɭəva mən canusun a naqəmati a ʦəmas.
S.FORM: pai aicu uri maleva men tjanusun a naqemati a Cemas.
S.PHON: pai aiʦu uri maɭəva mən ʦanusun a naqəmati a ʦəmas.
S.TRANSL: And now we will rejoice in you, creator God.

S.FORM: pai aitsu a i katsauan tisun a Tsemas a naqemati, mavan a muri nia sikaleva.
S.PHON: pai aiʦu a i kaʦauan tisun a ʦəmas a naqəmati, mavan a muri nia sikaɭəva.
S.FORM: pai aicu a i kacauan tisun a Cemas a naqemati, mavan a muri nia sikaleva.
S.PHON: pai aiʦu a i kaʦauan tisun a ʦəmas a naqəmati, mavan a muri nia sikaɭəva.
S.TRANSL: It is you, God, who created this world, and for that we rejoice in you.

S.FORM: sa?a pai aitsu su pinasuɫivatjan amen a Tsemas, su kinizangan amen tusa nia pinatsalivat a qadaw; malevaleva men aravats.
S.PHON: saʔa pai aiʦu su pinasuʎivacan amən a ʦəmas, su kinizaŋan amən tusa nia pinaʦaɭivat a qadaw; maɭəvaɭəva mən aravaʦ.
S.FORM: sa'a pai aicu su pinasuljivatjan amen a Cemas, su kinizangan amen tusa nia pinacalivat a qadaw; malevaleva men aravac.
S.PHON: saʔa pai aiʦu su pinasuʎivaʦan amən a ʦəmas, su kinizaŋan amən tusa nia pinaʦaɭivat a qadaw; maɭəvaɭəva mən aravaʦ.
S.TRANSL: And now you, God, have given us peace, you have guarded us through the past days; we rejoice greatly in you.

S.FORM: qau pai aitsu imazanga men i tjaiqayaw tjanusun a namaqepu a uri semenasenay a uri semupusupu tua su pazazekazekatj a Tsemas.
S.PHON: qau pai aiʦu imazaŋa mən i caiqajaw canusun a namaqəpu a uri səmənasənaj a uri səmupusupu tua su pazazəkazəkac a ʦəmas.
S.FORM: qau pai aicu imazanga men i tjaiqayaw tjanusun a namaqepu a uri semenasenay a uri semupusupu tua su pazazekazekatj a Cemas.
S.PHON: qau pai aiʦu imazaŋa mən i ʦaiqajaw ʦanusun a namaqəpu a uri səmənasənaj a uri səmupusupu tua su pazazəkazəkaʦ a ʦəmas.
S.TRANSL: And now here we are before you gathered to sing and to read your commands, God.

S.FORM: pai sa?a uɫa men a naɫemaluay, uɫa men a su kinizangan a kemasi patagiɫ a patje maqatsuvung tusa nia kinaqepuan.
S.PHON: pai saʔa uʎa mən a naʎəmaɭuaj, uʎa mən a su kinizaŋan a kəmasi patagiʎ a pacə maqaʦuvuŋ tusa nia kinaqəpuan.
S.FORM: pai sa'a ulja men a naljemaluay, ulja men a su kinizangan a kemasi patagilj a patje maqacuvung tusa nia kinaqepuan.
S.PHON: pai saʔa uʎa mən a naʎəmaɭuaj, uʎa mən a su kinizaŋan a kəmasi patagiʎ a paʦə maqaʦuvuŋ tusa nia kinaqəpuan.
S.TRANSL: So may we understand, and may we be guarded by you from the beginning to the end of our gathering.

S.FORM: uɫa men a napuzangar, uɫa men a natemavelak uta tua su pitsul tua su kiɫivak tusa nia kinaqepuan.
S.PHON: uʎa mən a napuzaŋar, uʎa mən a natəmavəɭak uta tua su piʦuɭ tua su kiʎivak tusa nia kinaqəpuan.
S.FORM: ulja men a napuzangar, ulja men a natemavelak uta tua su picul tua su kiljivak tusa nia kinaqepuan.
S.PHON: uʎa mən a napuzaŋar, uʎa mən a natəmavəɭak uta tua su piʦuɭ tua su kiʎivak tusa nia kinaqəpuan.
S.TRANSL: May we be joyful, and may we receive also your strength and love in our gathering.

S.FORM: sa?a aitsu a nia kiqaung a nia levan nia pinaka tjanusun a ti Yisu-sama.
S.PHON: saʔa aiʦu a nia kiqauŋ a nia ɭəvan nia pinaka canusun a ti jisu-sama.
S.FORM: sa'a aicu a nia kiqaung a nia levan nia pinaka tjanusun a ti Yisu-sama.
S.PHON: saʔa aiʦu a nia kiqauŋ a nia ɭəvan nia pinaka ʦanusun a ti jisu-sama.
S.TRANSL: And now our prayer and praise is made through you, Jesus.
